TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jerome_Allen, title = Jerome_Allen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jerome_Allen} }

S.FORM: == Jerome Allen == mhtuw ryax tay 28 na byacing te 1 nquw kawas ta 1973 squw Philadelphia quw Jerome Byron Allen. nalan unroing na MBA pzyuwi' mari' na yawa', ruw kyoreng misuw qani na NBA. 193cm kinwagiq' niya, ruw 84kg kin'usuw niya', kki'an niya' squw pzyuwi'an mari' ga maki' beh suruw ka psru' maras mari'. squw mqwas biru' raygak na mnluw squw gluw pzyuwi'an na Commonwealth of Pennsylvania, ruw minpusal magal sa pzyang blaq balay na sinsyuw pzyuwi' mari'. sa min sazing thwiru' mspung squw kawas te 1995 ga maki' squw binkgan te 49 quw lalu' niya', ruw wal galun kya na Minnesota Timberwolves. ryax niya' pinzyuwi' niya' mari' ga minluw Minnesota, llindiana,Pacers, Penver Nuggets ruw gluw na Union Europeenne. ryax niya mzyuwi' mari' NBA ga 336 kwara' 'ngal niya' tesu', 123 quw qnul maki' zin na yawa', 201 quw niwan wal niya' sraw magal tinsu' sa gluw niya'. kinmuci' na kirok niya' ga, minsazing mluw sa Iby League MVP. minkirok na ryax pinzyuwi'an niya' 1993~ 1995 minttzyul maras sa pennsylvanin magal icibang na IVY League. kawas te 1995 ga mzyup qsahuy na giqas na sinsyuw NBA, t'aring kya quw ppzyuwi' niya' markinmecyuw na pinhaw pbuling mari'i' la. 200 lga thuyay mgkyoreng na Raygak pennsylvanin la. 2014~ 2015 lga thuyay mgkyoreng kwara' na Raygak pennsylvanin la. 2015 ruw misuw qaniy lga galan praw kyoreng na Boston Celtics. pincyuwagan nya' Pzyux qu wayal niya' kirok ni Jerome Allen. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Jerome Allen

== Jerome Allen == mhtuw ryax tay 28 na byacing te 1 nquw kawas ta 1973 squw Philadelphia quw Jerome Byron Allen. nalan unroing na MBA pzyuwi' mari' na yawa', ruw kyoreng misuw qani na NBA. 193cm kinwagiq' niya, ruw 84kg kin'usuw niya', kki'an niya' squw pzyuwi'an mari' ga maki' beh suruw ka psru' maras mari'. squw mqwas biru' raygak na mnluw squw gluw pzyuwi'an na Commonwealth of Pennsylvania, ruw minpusal magal sa pzyang blaq balay na sinsyuw pzyuwi' mari'. sa min sazing thwiru' mspung squw kawas te 1995 ga maki' squw binkgan te 49 quw lalu' niya', ruw wal galun kya na Minnesota Timberwolves. ryax niya' pinzyuwi' niya' mari' ga minluw Minnesota, llindiana,Pacers, Penver Nuggets ruw gluw na Union Europeenne. ryax niya mzyuwi' mari' NBA ga 336 kwara' 'ngal niya' tesu', 123 quw qnul maki' zin na yawa', 201 quw niwan wal niya' sraw magal tinsu' sa gluw niya'. kinmuci' na kirok niya' ga, minsazing mluw sa Iby League MVP. minkirok na ryax pinzyuwi'an niya' 1993~ 1995 minttzyul maras sa pennsylvanin magal icibang na IVY League. kawas te 1995 ga mzyup qsahuy na giqas na sinsyuw NBA, t'aring kya quw ppzyuwi' niya' markinmecyuw na pinhaw pbuling mari'i' la. 200 lga thuyay mgkyoreng na Raygak pennsylvanin la. 2014~ 2015 lga thuyay mgkyoreng kwara' na Raygak pennsylvanin la. 2015 ruw misuw qaniy lga galan praw kyoreng na Boston Celtics. pincyuwagan nya' Pzyux qu wayal niya' kirok ni Jerome Allen. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Jerome Allen
S.PHON: == *erome allen == mħtuw rjax taj ** na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * nquw kawas~ɕ ta **** s~ɕquw pħila*elpħia quw *erome βjron allen. nalan unroiŋ na mβa pzjuwiʔ mariʔ na jawaʔ, ruw kjoreŋ mis~ɕuw qani na nβa. ***ʦ~ʨm kinwaɣiqʔ nija, ruw **kɣ kinʔus~ɕuw nijaʔ, kkiʔan nijaʔ s~ɕquw pzjuwiʔan mariʔ ɣa makiʔ βeħ s~ɕuruw ka ps~ɕruʔ maras~ɕ mariʔ. s~ɕquw mqwas~ɕ βiruʔ rajɣak na mnluw s~ɕquw ɣluw pzjuwiʔan na ʦ~ʨommonwealtħ o* penns~ɕjl*ania, ruw minpus~ɕal maɣal s~ɕa pzjaŋ βlaq βalaj na s~ɕins~ɕjuw pzjuwiʔ mariʔ. s~ɕa min s~ɕaziŋ tħwiruʔ ms~ɕpuŋ s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ te **** ɣa makiʔ s~ɕquw βinkɣan te ** quw laluʔ nijaʔ, ruw wal ɣalun kja na minnes~ɕota timβerwol*es~ɕ. rjax nijaʔ pinzjuwiʔ nijaʔ mariʔ ɣa minluw minnes~ɕota, llin*iana,paʦ~ʨers~ɕ, pen*er nuɣɣets~ɕ ruw ɣluw na union europeenne. rjax nija mzjuwiʔ mariʔ nβa ɣa *** kwaraʔ ʔŋal nijaʔ tes~ɕuʔ, *** quw qnul makiʔ zin na jawaʔ, *** quw niwan wal nijaʔ s~ɕraw maɣal tins~ɕuʔ s~ɕa ɣluw nijaʔ. kinmuʦ~ʨiʔ na kirok nijaʔ ɣa, mins~ɕaziŋ mluw s~ɕa iβj leaɣue m*p. minkirok na rjax pinzjuwiʔan nijaʔ ****~ **** minttzjul maras~ɕ s~ɕa penns~ɕjl*anin maɣal iʦ~ʨiβaŋ na i*j leaɣue. kawas~ɕ te **** ɣa mzjup qs~ɕaħuj na ɣiqas~ɕ na s~ɕins~ɕjuw nβa, tʔariŋ kja quw ppzjuwiʔ nijaʔ markinmeʦ~ʨjuw na pinħaw pβuliŋ mariʔiʔ la. *** lɣa tħujaj mɣkjoreŋ na rajɣak penns~ɕjl*anin la. ****~ **** lɣa tħujaj mɣkjoreŋ kwaraʔ na rajɣak penns~ɕjl*anin la. **** ruw mis~ɕuw qanij lɣa ɣalan praw kjoreŋ na βos~ɕton ʦ~ʨeltiʦ~ʨs~ɕ. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ pzjux qu wajal nijaʔ kirok ni *erome allen. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ *erome allen
